title: Election 2026 LIVE: 'If he's Singham, I am Pushpa', says TMC leader on IPS Ajay Sharma's Bengal deployment
description: Election 2026 LIVE: TMC supporters staged a protest in Falta of South 24 Parganas district on Tuesday, accusing ECI-appointed Indian Police Service officer Ajay Pal Sharma of the Uttar Pradesh cadre of "intimidating" party workers and leaders ahead of the second phase of polling in West Bengal.
